modules.title: Stage 1 · Java Foundations
modules.description: Learn Java syntax, types, control flow and methods.

lessons.title: Program structure
lessons.description: Understand classes, main methods and statements.
lessons.challenge: Create a valid Java program with a Main class and main method.

lessons.title: Variables and primitive types
lessons.description: Work with integers, decimals, booleans and strings.
lessons.challenge: Declare several primitive values and print a calculated result.

lessons.title: Conditionals
lessons.description: Express business rules with if, else if and else.
lessons.challenge: Print Pass when score is at least 70, otherwise Retry.

lessons.title: Loops and methods
lessons.description: Repeat work and move logic into reusable methods.
lessons.challenge: Create a method and call it from a loop.

modules.title: Stage 2 · Object-Oriented Java
modules.description: Model behaviour with classes, objects and interfaces.

lessons.title: Classes and objects
lessons.description: Represent data and behaviour together.
lessons.challenge: Create an Account object and update its balance through a method.

lessons.title: Encapsulation
lessons.description: Protect state with private fields and controlled access.
lessons.challenge: Keep balance private and expose it through a public method.

lessons.title: Inheritance and polymorphism
lessons.description: Reuse abstractions while allowing specialised behaviour.
lessons.challenge: Override a method and call it polymorphically.

lessons.title: Interfaces and abstractions
lessons.description: Define contracts independently of implementation.
lessons.challenge: Create an interface and a class that implements it.

modules.title: Stage 3 · Advanced Java
modules.description: Use collections, generics, streams and robust exception handling.

lessons.title: Collections framework
lessons.description: Use List, Set and Map effectively.
lessons.challenge: Create and populate a typed List.

lessons.title: Generics
lessons.description: Write reusable type-safe code.
lessons.challenge: Create a generic Box<T> and retrieve its value.

lessons.title: Lambdas and streams
lessons.description: Transform collections declaratively.
lessons.challenge: Use a stream to filter even numbers and calculate their total.

lessons.title: Exceptions
lessons.description: Handle failures without hiding them.
lessons.challenge: Catch a specific parsing exception and show a useful message.

modules.title: Stage 4 · Java Engineering
modules.description: Apply testing, build tools, design principles and concurrency.

lessons.title: JUnit-style testing
lessons.description: Verify behaviour through focused tests.
lessons.challenge: Create a simple behavioural test and fail clearly when the result is wrong.

lessons.title: SOLID and design
lessons.description: Separate responsibilities and depend on abstractions.
lessons.challenge: Inject an interface dependency rather than hard-coding an implementation.

lessons.title: Maven and project structure
lessons.description: Understand standard Java project organisation.
lessons.challenge: Describe the purpose of src/main/java, src/test/java and pom.xml.

lessons.title: Concurrency fundamentals
lessons.description: Reason about independent tasks and shared state.
lessons.challenge: Start a worker thread and wait for it to finish.

modules.title: Stage 5 · Enterprise Java
modules.description: Design database-backed APIs and Spring Boot services.

lessons.title: JDBC and persistence
lessons.description: Understand database connections and prepared statements.
lessons.challenge: Explain why prepared statements are safer than string concatenation.

lessons.title: Spring dependency injection
lessons.description: Use containers to wire application components.
lessons.challenge: Model a service whose repository dependency is injected.

lessons.title: Spring Boot REST APIs
lessons.description: Design controllers, requests and responses.
lessons.challenge: Describe a REST endpoint and its success and failure responses.

lessons.title: Validation and production readiness
lessons.description: Add health, validation, logging and deployment checks.
lessons.challenge: Create a production-readiness checklist for a Spring Boot service.
